title: Gas Station
input_format: Two integer arrays `gas` and `cost` of length `n`, where `gas[i]` is the gas available at station `i` and `cost[i]` is the gas needed to travel to station `i+1`.
output_format: Return the starting gas station index if you can travel around the circuit once, otherwise return `-1`.
function_signature: function canCompleteCircuit(gas: number[], cost: number[]): number {}
